title: Protein Intake Overview
text: Protein supports muscle maintenance and satiety. Distribute protein across meals and include a variety of sources such as lean poultry, legumes, dairy, and tofu.

title: Fiber and Blood Sugar
text: Dietary fiber slows digestion and can help moderate post-meal blood sugar spikes. Pair fiber-rich foods like legumes, whole grains, and vegetables with balanced protein and fat.

title: Sodium Awareness
text: Reducing sodium intake can support heart health. Favor herbs, citrus, and spice blends over salt-heavy seasonings when possible.
